modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble picking up my student Game Day ticket in Paciolan

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to grab my student Game Day ticket, right? But when I went to Paciolan, it just wasn’t working out. I mean, I thought it would be easy, but it turned into a bit of a hassle. Just wanted to enjoy the game!
